honesty_boundary: This is a Claude-simulated adversarial council (5 reviewer personas spawned via the Agent tool, project CLAUDE.md SS10.9 Council Mode). It is NOT the bltcy multi-vendor gateway panel (run_academic_review_panel.py), which could not run this session: OPENAI_BASE_URL/OPENAI_API_KEY are unset and the prior key was exhausted. Scores are not numerically comparable to the gpt-5.5/glm-5.1/deepseek/qwen/kimi gateway panels (v18-v36); use for qualitative consensus, not as a calibrated score against that series.

panel.lens: editorial decision / contribution coherence / IST fit
novelty vs closest prior / related-work completeness

consensus_concerns: Clarity/density is the binding constraint (clarity 5.8, lowest dimension): 11 Results subsections; many secondary breadth studies the paper itself says prove nothing about the core claim -> consolidate, demote OpenMC/classical-solver + read-only cross-program to an appendix.

Validity-coverage duality (C37) borders on a true-by-construction tautology (each MR scores one invariant); only the cross-SUT keystone (C36) is a genuine empirical test, n=2 CFD; stating it as a 'confirmed falsifiable principle' in the Abstract is stronger than n=2 qualitative evidence licenses.
Airfoil 'second task' surrogate is essentially untrained (one-step rel L2 ~1.00); 'primary-scale 240-cell' framing oversells a gate-discrimination demo on a non-functional model.

Pseudo-replication: the largest grids (180/180, 162/162) are correctly labelled descriptive, but the detector precision/recall Wilson CIs are reported inferentially over the same kind of non-independent cells -> inconsistent statistical treatment.

Novelty is incremental recombination (paper concedes this); missing on-point neighbor Spieker et al. (MET 2024 + IST 2025, symmetry MRs + statistical violation criterion); zhao2026noether self-cite x4 under single-anonymized review.
consensus_strengths: Exemplary reproducibility / evidence discipline: fail-closed claim ledger ties every number to a tracked artifact; spot-checked numbers matched raw JSON; Zenodo DOI; IST-compliant.
Measurement-floor admissibility gate is a genuine, correct, well-grounded contribution (O(h) P1 floor, closed-form predictor within 0.5%, a-priori spectral bound).
Strong construct discrimination via the airfoil second-task design (identical gate -> categorically different typed verdict for the physically correct reason).
Unusually honest scope/threats handling and a falsifiable central claim with explicit refutation conditions.

verified_actionable_findings.missing_citation: Spieker et al., Evaluating Human Trajectory Prediction with Metamorphic Testing, MET 2024, DOI 10.1145/3679006.3685071 (verified real); and same-venue Spieker et al., Metamorphic Testing of Multimodal Human Trajectory Prediction, IST 188:107890, 2025, DOI 10.1016/j.infsof.2025.107890 (verified real).
verified_actionable_findings.openmc_wording: Body prose says 'multi-group OpenMC' but the ledger/PROVENANCE specify '1-group infinite-medium' (run via OpenMC energy_mode=multi-group with self-generated 1-group MGXS). Reconcilable, but tighten body wording to match the ledger precision.
verified_actionable_findings.precision_recall_labeling: Label detector precision/recall (node-perm 1.00/1.00, conservation 1.00/0.81, mirror-y 0.94/0.55) consistently with the descriptive treatment used for the 180/180 grids.

v36_gateway_panel.note: multi-vendor gateway, pre-E5/pre-bib-fix manuscript; harsher Claude-council numbers are not directly comparable, but the verdict structure (3 major / 2 minor) and the clarity-is-weakest pattern reproduce.
